endpoints.name: GET /providers/Microsoft.DataCatalog/operations
endpoints.description: Lists all the available Azure Data Catalog service operations.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN.

endpoints.name: List catalogs in Resource Group (GET Resources)
endpoints.description: The List catalogs in Resource Group operation lists all the Azure Data Catalogs available under the given resource group.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{SUBSCRIPTIONID}} with a real subscriptionid. Replace {{RESOURCEGROUPNAME}} with a real resourcegroupname.

endpoints.name: Get Azure Data Catalog service (GET Resources)
endpoints.description: The Get Azure Data Catalog Service operation retrieves a json representation of the data catalog.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{SUBSCRIPTIONID}} with a real subscriptionid. Replace {{CATALOGNAME}} with a real catalogname. Replace {{RESOURCEGROUPNAME}} with a real resourcegroupname.

endpoints.name: Create or Update Azure Data Catalog service (PUT Resource)
endpoints.description: The Create Azure Data Catalog service operation creates a new data catalog service with the specified parameters. If the specific service already exists, then any patchable properties will be updated and any immutable properties will remain unchanged.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{SUBSCRIPTIONID}} with a real subscriptionid. Replace {{CATALOGNAME}} with a real catalogname. Replace {{RESOURCEGROUPNAME}} with a real resourcegroupname.

endpoints.name: Delete Azure Data Catalog Service (DELETE Resource)
endpoints.description: The Delete Azure Data Catalog Service operation deletes an existing data catalog.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{SUBSCRIPTIONID}} with a real subscriptionid. Replace {{CATALOGNAME}} with a real catalogname. Replace {{RESOURCEGROUPNAME}} with a real resourcegroupname.

endpoints.name: Update Azure Data Catalog Service (PATCH Resource)
endpoints.description: The Update Azure Data Catalog Service operation can be used to update the existing deployment. The update call only supports the properties listed in the PATCH body.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{SUBSCRIPTIONID}} with a real subscriptionid. Replace {{CATALOGNAME}} with a real catalogname. Replace {{RESOURCEGROUPNAME}} with a real resourcegroupname.
